mapper.select: SELECT U.user_id, U.name, U.target_glucose, U.max_insulin_daily, D.device_id, D.hard_limit_per_dose, D.insulin_remaining, D.battery_level FROM Users U LEFT JOIN Devices D ON U.user_id = D.user_id WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Devices SET insulin_remaining = #{insulinRemaining}, needle_count = #{needleCount}, battery_level = #{batteryLevel}, last_update = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
